hero.subtitle: Our local experts in Sri Lanka offer private and tailor-made tours.

footer.description: Sri Lanka Eden Travels is part of a well-established group of companies operating in Sri Lanka’s inbound tourism sector. With over 13 years of experience in the industry, we specialize in delivering authentic, tailor-made travel experiences that showcase the true beauty and culture of Sri Lanka, while maintaining ethical practices and promoting responsible tourism.
footer.copyright: Sri Lanka Eden Travels. All rights reserved.
footer.office1: Kandy : Stone House Suites, No 38, Nittawela Road Kandy, Sri Lanka
footer.office2: Kurunegala : No. 64, 4th floor, Unit 01, Siripathi Complex, Bauddaloka Rd, Kurunegala,Sri Lanka

why.subtitle: We take pride in offering authentic and personalized travel experiences.
why.d1: Our guides are locals who know the hidden treasures and secret stories of Sri Lanka.
why.d2: Your safety is our priority. We offer 24/7 assistance and verified accommodations.
why.d3: Every traveler is unique. We customize each itinerary according to your preferences.
why.d4: We are by your side at every step of your journey for a worry-free experience.

aboutUs.heroDesc: We are a multicultural team dedicated to creating authentic and personalized travel experiences in Sri Lanka.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc1: We are a multicultural team based in Kandy and Kurunegala, in the heart of Sri Lanka, specializing in personalized travel experiences that showcase the authentic beauty of our island nation.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc2: Proud to be part of the Sri Lanka Viajes Eden group, we share the same passion, professionalism, and commitment to excellence. All our operations are based in Sri Lanka, supported by a dedicated local team of travel specialists, experienced guides, and professional drivers.
aboutUs.whatSetsUsApartSubtitle: Our diverse team brings together the best of local knowledge and international service standards.
aboutUs.apart1Desc: Your stay in Sri Lanka should be about discovery, not commercial pitches. We focus solely on creating meaningful experiences that show the real Sri Lanka.
aboutUs.apart2Desc: Being based right here in Kandy allows us to stay connected to the pulse of Sri Lanka. We keep up with local festivals and authentic cultural experiences with our Superior category hotels.
aboutUs.apart3Desc: Our drivers are specially trained to meet European expectations for safety and comfort, providing a smooth and predictable service.
aboutUs.apart4Desc: Our reputation speaks through the voices of those who have traveled with us. Browse our customer testimonials to hear directly from other travelers.
aboutUs.teamSubtitle: The dedicated professionals who make your dream trip a reality behind the scenes.
aboutUs.guidesSubtitle: Your travel companions. Local experts who transform every tour into an authentic experience.

Sanji.desc: Born in Sri Lanka with professional experience in Europe, he is the co-founder of the agency. Specialized in assisting Spanish-speaking travelers.

Ana.desc: She specializes in designing tailor-made trips, ensuring every detail to create unique and memorable experiences.

Jose.desc: Jose designs tailor-made trips for Spanish and Latin American travelers. Passionate and attentive to details.

Marco.desc: Marco designs personalized itineraries and coordinates Viaggi Eden, ensuring an essential link between Italy and Sri Lanka.

Manjula.desc: Mr. Manjula ensures the smooth running of daily operations, coordinates teams, and oversees workflows to maintain efficiency.

Rasika.desc: Rasika handles financial management with expertise and precision, ensuring efficiency and stability within the company.

Nethmi.desc: Nethmi offers personalized support, designing trips that combine culture and comfort for a successful experience.

Thakshila.desc: Thakshila leads digital operations, managing systems, CRM, and the website, ensuring innovation across all platforms.

Anjan.desc: Anjan manages billing, payments, and the budget with an eye for detail, ensuring efficient financial control.

Dewni.desc: Dewni provides IT support, managing updates and troubleshooting for smooth technical operations.

Oshadhi.desc: Oshadhi supports daily excursions, helping with itinerary planning and coordination.

Sewmini.desc: Sewmini supports accounting, costing, and quoting services with accuracy.

Kasun.desc: Kasun helps prepare personalized itineraries and handles customer communication for their bookings.

Thenura.desc: Thenura develops the agency's custom CRM, creating tools that streamline processes and optimize service.

Sithmi.desc: Sithmi focuses on customer management and designing tailor-made itineraries that meet travelers' expectations.

Theekshana.desc: Theekshana supports marketing activities and helps prepare itineraries through social content creation.

Sampath.desc: Our star chauffeur-guide, one of the best Spanish speakers. Experienced and warm, he creates unforgettable experiences.

Nalinda.desc: Fluent in Spanish, known for his kindness and special attention to children. Careful and always positive.

Nazri.desc: Very attentive to families, he knows local customs perfectly and goes out of his way to satisfy travelers.

Chammi.desc: Friendly and professional, he handles all logistical details. His safe driving and reliability make every journey pleasant.

Chamara.desc: Takes care of all logistical details to ensure a comfortable trip. Reliable with a warm personality.

Ajeeb.desc: The ideal companion for a peaceful journey. His availability and professionalism guarantee total serenity.

Noel.desc: Fluent in Italian, Noel takes care of everything so you can fully enjoy. His kindness ensures your well-being.

Chinthaka.desc: Friendly and experienced Italian-speaking chauffeur. Professional and attentive, he guarantees a safe and unforgettable experience.

bookingForm.errorDates: Please select your arrival and departure dates.

bookingForm.step1Desc: Your contact details to reach you

includedExcluded.title: What is included and excluded
includedExcluded.inc1: Hotel accommodation (according to the selected package)
includedExcluded.inc6: Fuel, road tax, government taxes, parking and vehicle insurance

paymentPolicy.title: Payment Method and Cancellation Policy
paymentPolicy.pay2: Credit/debit card payment – A 2% card processing fee will apply.
paymentPolicy.term1: A 40% deposit is required at the time of booking to confirm your stay.
paymentPolicy.term2: The remaining 60% balance must be paid no later than 30 days prior to arrival.
paymentPolicy.term3: Upon receipt of the deposit, a confirmation receipt will be issued. An official invoice will follow upon full payment.
paymentPolicy.canc1: Up to 45 days: 100% of the deposit refunded.
paymentPolicy.canc2: From 44 to 31 days: 50% penalty on the deposit.
paymentPolicy.canc3: Less than 30 days: the deposit is non-refundable.
paymentPolicy.canc4: Note: All cancellations are subject to an administrative fee of €120 per person.

bookingCard.desc: Flexible dates available. We tailor every detail to your pace, ensuring an unforgettable getaway in Sri Lanka.
bookingCard.note: *Price may vary depending on customization and seasonal availability
